question: After docs search gives me a Stellar developer-docs page path, how do I read that whole page in section order rather than rely on one snippet?

golden.answer: Pass the exact url_without_anchor path from the search hit to get_doc_page_sections. Keep includeContent enabled when reading the page, then consume the returned headings, breadcrumbs, anchors, and content in on-page order. This is a page-follow-up operation; it is not a corpus-wide search.
keyFacts: Uses the exact path from a prior docs hit, without the domain or anchor.
Reads ordered section headings and content rather than treating one search snippet as the page.
avoid: Do NOT pass a full external URL or fragment where the operation requires a /docs or /meetings path.
Do NOT treat one snippet as the complete page.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.

evidence: 2026-07-11 localhost:8787 search→execute probe observed: HTTP 200; get_doc_page_sections returned envelope ok=true for the storing-data path with ordered headings and content.
specs/stellar-docs.json exists and supports the behavioral golden.
Sibling sweep: reviewed existing battery cases sharing the exercised surface; no contradictory behavioral golden found.
